name: -g
--general-numeric-sort
options.description: Compare according to general numeric value

name: -u
--unique
options.description: Output only the first of equal lines

name: -f
--ignore-case
options.description: Fold lowercase to uppercase when comparing

name: -k
--key
options.description: Sort using the given key definition

name: -t
--field-separator
options.description: Use this character as the field separator

name: -o
--output
options.description: Write the result to a file instead of stdout

name: -c
--check
options.description: Check whether the input is sorted; do not sort
